requirement_topic.en: Iraq Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, Ministry of Electricity (MoE) Project Approvals, and IEC 62933 Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 伊拉克BESS并网——50 Hz系统、电力部（MoE）项目审批及IEC 62933要求
requirement_topic.zht: 伊拉克BESS併網——50 Hz系統、電力部（MoE）項目審批及IEC 62933要求

summary.en: Iraq's Ministry of Electricity (MoE) is the primary authority governing electricity grid infrastructure, power generation projects, and grid-connection approvals. All utility-scale and grid-connected BESS installations require MoE project approval and technical review. Iraq's national grid operates at 230/400 V, 50 Hz (single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V) — distinct from China's 220/380 V. Grid instability is a defining feature of Iraq's electricity system; BESS installations frequently serve hybrid, off-grid, or diesel-backup-smoothing roles in addition to utility-scale grid support. International project developers active in Iraq (TotalEnergies, PowerChina, Masdar) typically reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards — including IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) and IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) — in project specifications and lender technical requirements. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must be designed, configured, and validated for Iraq's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. Publicly accessible MoE technical specifications specifically for BESS grid connection have not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific requirements must be obtained directly from MoE or the project owner.
summary.zh: 伊拉克电力部（MoE）是负责电力电网基础设施、发电项目及并网审批的主要机关。所有公用事业规模和并网BESS装置均须取得MoE项目审批和技术审查。伊拉克国家电网运行参数为230/400 V、50 Hz（单相230 V、三相400 V）——与中国220/380 V不同。电网不稳定是伊拉克电力系统的显著特征；BESS装置除提供公用事业规模电网支撑外，还常作为混合、离网或柴油备用平滑角色。在伊拉克活跃的国际项目开发商（道达尔能源、PowerChina、Masdar）通常在项目规格和贷款方技术要求中引用IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准——包括IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）和IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）。BESS储能变流器（PCS）须针对伊拉克230/400 V、50 Hz电网进行设计、配置和验证。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认MoE公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格；项目专属要求须直接向MoE或项目业主获取。
summary.zht: 伊拉克電力部（MoE）是負責電力電網基礎設施、發電項目及併網審批的主要機關。所有公用事業規模和併網BESS裝置均須取得MoE項目審批和技術審查。伊拉克國家電網運行參數為230/400 V、50 Hz（單相230 V、三相400 V）——與中國220/380 V不同。電網不穩定是伊拉克電力系統的顯著特徵；BESS裝置除提供公用事業規模電網支撐外，還常作為混合、離網或柴油備用平滑角色。在伊拉克活躍的國際項目開發商（道達爾能源、PowerChina、Masdar）通常在項目規格和貸款方技術要求中引用IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準——包括IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）和IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須針對伊拉克230/400 V、50 Hz電網進行設計、配置和驗證。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認MoE公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格；項目專屬要求須直接向MoE或項目業主獲取。

standards_or_laws: Iraq Ministry of Electricity (MoE) — project approval authority for all grid-connected power and storage installations; website: moelc.gov.iq
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Iraq grid parameters: 230/400 V, 50 Hz (single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Iraq's 230/400 V. PCS firmware and voltage protection parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Iraq's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid conditions before project commissioning. GB/T 36558-2023 and related Chinese grid-connection certificates are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62933 evidence in Iraq project or MoE review.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与伊拉克230/400 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件和电压保护参数，须在项目调试前重新针对伊拉克230/400 V、50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置。GB/T 36558-2023及相关中国并网证书不被接受为伊拉克项目或MoE审查中IEC 62933证据的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與伊拉克230/400 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體和電壓保護參數，須在項目調試前重新針對伊拉克230/400 V、50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置。GB/T 36558-2023及相關中國併網證書不被接受為伊拉克項目或MoE審查中IEC 62933證據的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy Iraq MoE grid-connection requirements. Key technical differences and actions required: (a) grid voltage — Iraq is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and reactive power compensation must be reconfigured and retested for Iraq's nominal voltage; (b) grid instability context — Iraq's frequent voltage and frequency deviations require wider operating range settings for PCS ride-through capability; BESS systems designed for China's relatively stable grid may need enhanced protection and operating range adjustments; (c) MoE project approval — engage MoE and the project owner at the earliest stage to obtain technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (d) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project lenders or project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (e) SCADA and communication protocols — confirm the communication interface protocol required for BESS monitoring in MoE or project-owner SCADA systems.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足伊拉克MoE并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异及所需行动：（a）电网电压——伊拉克为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数及无功补偿须重新针对伊拉克额定电压配置并重新测试；（b）电网不稳定背景——伊拉克频繁的电压和频率偏差要求PCS穿越能力具有更宽的运行范围设置；针对中国相对稳定电网设计的BESS系统可能需要强化保护和扩大运行范围；（c）MoE项目审批——应在设备设计最终确定前，在项目最早阶段与MoE及项目业主接触以获取技术要求；（d）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目贷款方或项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（e）SCADA和通信协议——确认MoE或项目业主SCADA系统中BESS监控所要求的通信接口协议。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足伊拉克MoE併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異及所需行動：（a）電網電壓——伊拉克為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數及無功補償須重新針對伊拉克額定電壓配置並重新測試；（b）電網不穩定背景——伊拉克頻繁的電壓和頻率偏差要求PCS穿越能力具有更寬的運行範圍設置；針對中國相對穩定電網設計的BESS系統可能需要強化保護和擴大運行範圍；（c）MoE項目審批——應在設備設計最終確定前，在項目最早階段與MoE及項目業主接觸以獲取技術要求；（d）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目貸款方或項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（e）SCADA和通訊協議——確認MoE或項目業主SCADA系統中BESS監控所要求的通訊接口協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MoE project approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Iraq; technical requirements are project-specific and must be obtained directly from MoE or the project owner
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Iraq

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Iraq MoE grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Iraq's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, with particular attention to wider ride-through tolerances reflecting Iraq's grid instability. Engage MoE and the project owner at the earliest project stage to determine applicable IEC 62933 evidence requirements and SCADA/communication protocol specifications. No publicly accessible MoE technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct MoE and project-owner engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足伊拉克MoE并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对伊拉克230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置，尤其须注意反映伊拉克电网不稳定性的更宽穿越容差。应在项目最早阶段与MoE及项目业主接触，确定适用IEC 62933证据要求及SCADA/通信协议规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认MoE公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与MoE和项目业主接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足伊拉克MoE併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對伊拉克230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置，尤其須注意反映伊拉克電網不穩定性的更寬穿越容差。應在項目最早階段與MoE及項目業主接觸，確定適用IEC 62933證據要求及SCADA/通訊協議規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認MoE公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與MoE和項目業主接觸至關重要。
